task_objective: Implement the QAM UI cleanup plan by reorganizing frontend panels, replacing the plugin icon, improving focus behavior, and tightening status/version presentation.
design_decisions: Kept the change frontend-only with no backend RPC, settings schema, or dependency changes.
Used a local inline PluginIcon component with currentColor instead of the LuDatabaseBackup react-icon.
Split the QAM controls into GLOBAL and GAME panels so automatic sync and refresh are separated from selected-game controls.
Used Decky Field and highlightOnFocus/focusable props for full-row focus behavior where the installed @decky/ui types support them.
Kept the titleView scoped to plugin-owned plain markup rather than using staticClasses.Title.
Matched the custom QAM icon to react-icons sizing by setting width and height to 1em.
Wrapped toggle fields in a scoped full-width container because ToggleField does not expose className or style props.
Increased the last-operation value text to 14px while retaining no-wrap ellipsis behavior.
results: Verified the new static frontend tests failed before implementation.
Passed targeted frontend static tests after implementation.
Passed full validation through ruff, ty, pytest, pnpm typecheck, and pnpm verify.
